text:
Table: AFDevice

Description:
Tracks external/third-party GPS devices (e.g., ATrack/Fleet devices) integrated via AF API. Stores device metadata like IMEI, serial number, model, manufacturer, installation details, customer mapping, and last-seen timestamps for cross-platform device management.

Columns:
- AFDeviceId: int (PK, identity)
- Imei: nvarchar (nullable)
- Active: bit (nullable)
- Comment: nvarchar (nullable)
- AddressableId: nvarchar (nullable)
- Contract: nvarchar (nullable)
- Notes: nvarchar (nullable)
- LastSeen: nvarchar (nullable)
- FirstSeen: nvarchar (nullable)
- Status: nvarchar (nullable)
- Billing: nvarchar (nullable)
- Manufacturer: nvarchar (nullable)
- Model: nvarchar (nullable)
- TimeZone: nvarchar (nullable)
- SerialNumber: nvarchar (nullable)
- InstallationDate: nvarchar (nullable)
- ExpectedReportingFrequencyHours: nvarchar (nullable)
- DataAllowanceMb: nvarchar (nullable)
- MessageAllowance: nvarchar (nullable)
- HomeGeoFenceId: nvarchar (nullable)
- DeviceTypeId: nvarchar (nullable)
- Guid: nvarchar (nullable)
- Customer: nvarchar (nullable)
- CustomerId: nvarchar (nullable)
- CustomerGuid: nvarchar (nullable)
- Partner: nvarchar (nullable)
- PartnerId: nvarchar (nullable)
- Id: nvarchar (nullable)
- LastUpdated: nvarchar (nullable)
- UpdatedBy: nvarchar (nullable)

Relationships:
- Id → AlertLocationDetail.Id (inferred)
- CustomerId → Customer.CustomerId (inferred)

Keywords:
af device, third-party gps, external device, IMEI, fleet device, atrack, device integration

Table: AccessoriesMaster

Description:
Manages accessories and add-on hardware attached to tracked assets (vehicles). Stores details like accessory type, serial number, model, SIM card info, plate numbers, CCTV credentials, and associated asset/customer.

Columns:
- AccessoryId: bigint (PK, identity)
- AssetId: int (nullable)
- AccessoryType: varchar (nullable)
- AccessorySerial: varchar (nullable)
- AccessoryModel: varchar (nullable)
- AccessoryApiCode: varchar (nullable)
- AccessorySim: varchar (nullable)
- PlateNum: varchar (nullable)
- DeviceNo: varchar (nullable)
- DeviceStatus: bit (nullable)
- IsActive: bit (nullable)
- UserID: varchar (nullable)
- CustomerID: int (nullable)
- AssetCCTVCredentialsID: int

Relationships:
- AssetId → Asset.AssetId (inferred)

Keywords:
accessory, hardware, SIM, plate number, CCTV, device attachment, vehicle equipment

Table: AlertCategory

Description:
Lookup table for categorising different types of alerts. Used to group and filter alert settings by category (e.g., speeding, geofence, idle, harsh driving).

Columns:
- AlertCategoryId: int (PK)
- Name: nvarchar

Relationships:
- Name → AspNetUserTokens.Name (inferred)

Keywords:
alert category, alert type, notification group

Table: AlertDay

Description:
Stores the day-of-week configuration for alert schedules. Each record links to an AlertSetting and specifies which days the alert is active, including an option to cover all times.

Columns:
- AlertDaysId: int (PK, identity)
- AlertSettingId: int
- AlertDayNo: int
- IsAllTimes: bit

Relationships:
- AlertSettingId → AlertSettingMaster.AlertSettingId (inferred)

Keywords:
alert schedule, day of week, alert timing, active days

Table: AlertDetails

Description:
Stores per-alert delivery details including the recipient (AlertTo) and alert type for each alert record. Supports multi-recipient alert dispatching.

Columns:
- ID: bigint (PK, identity)
- AlertId: bigint (nullable)
- AlertTo: nvarchar (nullable)
- AlertTypeID: bigint (nullable)

Relationships:
- ID → AlertTypes.ID (inferred)

Keywords:
alert recipient, alert delivery, alert detail

Table: AlertItem

Description:
Records individual alert events triggered by asset mode changes or threshold breaches. Contains alert type, asset/driver/customer details, trigger time, delivery attempt info, location, and completion status.

Columns:
- AlertItemId: int (PK, identity)
- AlertId: int (nullable)
- UserId: nvarchar (nullable)
- CustomerId: int (nullable)
- AssetId: int (nullable)
- ModeId: int (nullable)
- ModeName: varchar (nullable)
- ModeForMinute: int (nullable)
- IsModeOn: bit (nullable)
- DescA: varchar (nullable)
- DriverId: int (nullable)
- AlarmNewsUsers: nvarchar (nullable)
- ApproveTime: datetime (nullable)
- AlertTypeId: int (nullable)
- AlertTo: nvarchar (nullable)
- TimeZone: varchar (nullable)
- LogTimeStampUTC: bigint (nullable)
- LogTimeStampTz: bigint (nullable)
- Attempt: int (nullable)
- JobID: varchar (nullable)
- IsCompleted: bit (nullable)
- AlertGenerateDateTimeUTC: datetime (nullable)
- TriggerTime: datetime (nullable)
- AssetModeChangeId: int (nullable)
- AlertLocation: nvarchar (nullable)
- AlertLatitude: float (nullable)
- AlertLongtitude: float (nullable)
- IsSeen: bit (nullable)

Relationships:
- UserId → AspNetUserRoles.UserId (inferred)
- AssetId → Asset.AssetId (inferred)
- AssetModeChangeId → AssetModeChange.AssetModeChangeId (inferred)
- CustomerId → Customer.CustomerId (inferred)
- ModeId → CustomerMode.ModeId (inferred)
- DriverId → Driver.DriverId (inferred)

Keywords:
alert event, triggered alert, notification, speeding, geofence, mode change, harsh driving

Table: AlertItemLog

Description:
Audit log for news feed alert items. Tracks which users have read a particular alert item, their approval capability, and timestamp of when they viewed it.

Columns:
- NewsFeedItemLogId: int (PK, identity)
- UserId: nvarchar (nullable)
- CustomerId: int (nullable)
- NewsFeedId: int (nullable)
- ItemRead: datetime (nullable)
- CanApprove: bit (nullable)

Relationships:
- UserId → AspNetUserRoles.UserId (inferred)
- CustomerId → Customer.CustomerId (inferred)

Keywords:
alert log, notification read, news feed, user read status

Table: AlertLocationDetail

Description:
Stores geofence-based alert details — which customer location triggered the alert, entry/exit status, and duration thresholds for location-based alert rules.

Columns:
- Id: bigint (PK, identity)
- AlertId: bigint (nullable)
- CustomerLocationId: int (nullable)
- Status: bit (nullable)
- Period: int (nullable)
- LocationGroupId: int (nullable)

Relationships:
- Id → AlertModeDetail.Id (inferred)
- CustomerLocationId → CustomerLocation.CustomerLocationId (inferred)

Keywords:
geofence alert, location alert, entry exit alert

Table: AlertLocationItem

Description:
Records triggered geofence alert events including asset entry/exit details, location name, driver, trigger time, delivery status, and geo-coordinates of the alert event.

Columns:
- AlertLocationItemId: int (PK, identity)
- AlertId: int (nullable)
- UserId: nvarchar (nullable)
- CustomerId: int (nullable)
- AssetId: int (nullable)
- CustomerLocationId: int (nullable)
- LocationName: nvarchar (nullable)
- LocationForMinutes: int (nullable)
- IsGeofenceIn: bit (nullable)
- DescA: varchar (nullable)
- DriverId: int (nullable)
- AlertTypeId: int (nullable)
- AlertTo: nvarchar (nullable)
- TimeZone: varchar (nullable)
- LogTimeStampUTC: bigint (nullable)
- LogTimeStampTZ: bigint (nullable)
- Attempt: int (nullable)
- JobId: varchar (nullable)
- IsCompleted: bit (nullable)
- AlertGenerateDateTimeUTC: datetime (nullable)
- TriggerTime: datetime (nullable)
- AssetGeofenceEventId: int (nullable)
- AlertAddress: nvarchar (nullable)
- AlertLatitude: float (nullable)
- AlertLongitude: float (nullable)
- IsSeen: bit (nullable)

Relationships:
- UserId → AspNetUserRoles.UserId (inferred)
- AssetId → Asset.AssetId (inferred)
- CustomerId → Customer.CustomerId (inferred)
- CustomerLocationId → CustomerLocation.CustomerLocationId (inferred)
- DriverId → Driver.DriverId (inferred)

Keywords:
geofence event alert, location triggered, entry exit notification

Table: AlertMaster

Description:
Master configuration record for each alert. Defines alert name, scope (asset list, group list, type list), delivery channels (email, SMS, on-screen, API), body template, and active/deleted flags.

Columns:
- AlertId: bigint (identity)
- UserId: nvarchar (nullable)
- CustomerId: int (nullable)
- GroupList: nvarchar (nullable)
- TypeList: nvarchar (nullable)
- AssetList: nvarchar (nullable)
- AlertCategory: int (nullable)
- AlertName: nvarchar (nullable)
- ItemBody: nvarchar (nullable)
- OnScreen: bit (nullable)
- Alarm: bit (nullable)
- Email: bit (nullable)
- Sms: bit (nullable)
- Api: bit (nullable)
- ItemData: nvarchar (nullable)
- IsDeleted: bit (nullable)
- IsEnabled: bit (nullable)

Relationships:
- UserId → AspNetUserRoles.UserId (inferred)
- CustomerId → Customer.CustomerId (inferred)

Keywords:
alert configuration, alert setup, notification rule, alert name

Table: AlertMode

Description:
Stores mode-specific alert trigger settings. Links an alert setting to a specific operational mode, with a duration threshold and whether the mode needs to be ON or OFF to trigger.

Columns:
- AlertModeId: int (PK, identity)
- AlertSettingId: int
- ModeID: int
- ModeForMinutes: int
- IsModeOn: bit (nullable)

Relationships:
- AlertSettingId → AlertSettingMaster.AlertSettingId (inferred)
- AlertModeId → SAMSystemAlertMode.AlertModeId (inferred)

Keywords:
mode alert, operational mode trigger, mode duration alert

Table: AlertModeDetail

Description:
Stores per-alert mode condition details, specifying which modes are active/inactive for a given alert configuration, including status flag and time period.

Columns:
- Id: bigint (PK, identity)
- AlertId: bigint (nullable)
- ModeId: int (nullable)
- Status: bit (nullable)
- Period: int (nullable)

Relationships:
- Id → AlertLocationDetail.Id (inferred)
- ModeId → CustomerMode.ModeId (inferred)

Keywords:
mode condition, alert mode status, mode period

Table: AlertSettingDetails

Description:
Maps alert setting configurations to specific reference IDs (assets, groups, drivers etc.), providing the many-to-many link between an alert setting and its applicable entities.

Columns:
- AlertSettingDetailId: int (PK, identity)
- AlertSettingId: int (nullable)
- RefId: int (nullable)

Relationships:
- AlertSettingId → AlertSettingMaster.AlertSettingId (inferred)

Keywords:
alert setting asset mapping, alert scope, alert reference

Table: AlertSettingMaster

Description:
Core alert configuration table. Stores all settings for a configurable alert: customer, user, schedule, notification channels, contact info (email/mobile), schedule type (all days/times), and modification audit fields.

Columns:
- AlertSettingId: int (PK, identity)
- CustomerId: int
- UserId: nvarchar
- SettingLabel: varchar
- IsSMS: bit
- IsEmail: bit
- IsNotification: bit
- IsEmergency: bit
- MobileNo: varchar (nullable)
- EmailAddress: varchar (nullable)
- CreateDate: datetime (nullable)
- LastModifyDate: datetime (nullable)
- IpAddress: varchar (nullable)
- LoginUserId: varchar (nullable)
- AsssetRefType: int (nullable)
- IsAllDays: bit (nullable)
- IsAllTimes: bit (nullable)

Relationships:
- UserId → AspNetUserRoles.UserId (inferred)
- CustomerId → Customer.CustomerId (inferred)
- AlertSettingId → SAMSystemAlertSettingMaster.AlertSettingId (inferred)

Keywords:
alert setting, notification config, email alert, SMS alert, schedule

Table: AlertSettingTemplates

Description:
Stores notification message templates for each alert setting. Contains SMS body, email subject/body, on-screen notification title/body, and popup notification templates to customise delivery messages.

Columns:
- AlertSettingTemplatesId: int (PK, identity)
- AlertSettingId: int
- SMSTemplate: varchar (nullable)
- EMailSubject: varchar (nullable)
- EmailBody: varchar (nullable)
- OnScreenNotificationTitle: nvarchar (nullable)
- OnScreenNotification: nvarchar (nullable)
- PopupNotifyTitle: nvarchar (nullable)
- PopupNotifyDetails: nvarchar (nullable)

Relationships:
- AlertSettingId → AlertSettingMaster.AlertSettingId (inferred)

Keywords:
alert template, email template, SMS template, notification message

Table: AlertTime

Description:
Stores time-window ranges for alert schedules. Each record links to an AlertSetting and AlertDay to define specific from/to time windows when alerts are active.

Columns:
- AlertTimeSpanId: int (PK, identity)
- AlertSettingId: int (nullable)
- AlertDaysId: int (nullable)
- FromTime: varchar (nullable)
- ToTime: varchar (nullable)

Relationships:
- AlertDaysId → AlertDay.AlertDaysId (inferred)
- AlertSettingId → AlertSettingMaster.AlertSettingId (inferred)

Keywords:
alert time window, from to time, active hours, schedule time

Table: AlertTransaction

Description:
Records each dispatched alert transaction including alert type, asset/driver/mode/customer details, delivery info (email/mobile), job ID for async processing, attempt count, completion status, and geo-location of the event.

Columns:
- AlertTransId: bigint (PK, identity)
- AlertSettingId: int (nullable)
- CustomerId: int (nullable)
- UserId: nvarchar (nullable)
- AlertType: int (nullable)
- MobileNo: varchar (nullable)
- EmailAddress: varchar (nullable)
- ModeId: int (nullable)
- ModeName: varchar (nullable)
- ModeForMinute: int (nullable)
- IsModeOn: bit (nullable)
- AsssetRefType: int (nullable)
- AssetId: int (nullable)
- DescA: varchar (nullable)
- AssetModeChangeId: int (nullable)
- AlertDaysId: int (nullable)
- AlertDayNo: int (nullable)
- AlertTimeSpanId: int (nullable)
- FromTime: varchar (nullable)
- ToTime: varchar (nullable)
- TimeZone: varchar (nullable)
- LogTimeStampUTC: bigint (nullable)
- LogTimeStampTz: bigint (nullable)
- Attempt: int (nullable)
- JobID: varchar (nullable)
- IsCompleted: bit (nullable)
- AlertGenerateDateTimeUTC: datetime (nullable)
- AlertLocation: nvarchar (nullable)
- AlertLatitude: float (nullable)
- AlertLongtitude: float (nullable)
- IsSeen: bit (nullable)

Relationships:
- AlertDaysId → AlertDay.AlertDaysId (inferred)
- AlertSettingId → AlertSettingMaster.AlertSettingId (inferred)
- AlertTimeSpanId → AlertTime.AlertTimeSpanId (inferred)
- UserId → AspNetUserRoles.UserId (inferred)
- AssetId → Asset.AssetId (inferred)
- AssetModeChangeId → AssetModeChange.AssetModeChangeId (inferred)
- CustomerId → Customer.CustomerId (inferred)
- ModeId → CustomerMode.ModeId (inferred)

Keywords:
alert delivery, sent alert, notification dispatch, job, attempt

Table: AlertTransactionLog

Description:
Detailed execution log for each alert delivery attempt. Extends AlertTransaction with per-attempt response data, process timestamps, and completion status for full audit trail of alert dispatching.

Columns:
- AlertTransLogId: bigint (PK, identity)
- AlertTransId: bigint
- AlertSettingId: int (nullable)
- CustomerId: int (nullable)
- UserId: nvarchar (nullable)
- AlertType: int (nullable)
- MobileNo: varchar (nullable)
- EmailAddress: varchar (nullable)
- ModeId: int (nullable)
- ModeName: varchar (nullable)
- ModeForMinute: int (nullable)
- IsModeOn: bit (nullable)
- AsssetRefType: int (nullable)
- AssetId: int (nullable)
- DescA: varchar (nullable)
- AssetModeChangeId: int (nullable)
- AlertDaysId: int (nullable)
- AlertDayNo: int (nullable)
- AlertTimeSpanId: int (nullable)
- FromTime: varchar (nullable)
- ToTime: varchar (nullable)
- TimeZone: varchar (nullable)
- LogTimeStampUTC: bigint (nullable)
- LogTimeStampTz: bigint (nullable)
- Attempt: int (nullable)
- JobID: varchar (nullable)
- AttemptNo: int (nullable)
- Response: varchar (nullable)
- IsCompleted: bit (nullable)
- ProcessDateTimeUTC: datetime (nullable)
- AlertLocation: nvarchar (nullable)
- AlertLatitude: float (nullable)
- AlertLongtitude: float (nullable)
- IsSeen: bit (nullable)

Relationships:
- AlertDaysId → AlertDay.AlertDaysId (inferred)
- AlertSettingId → AlertSettingMaster.AlertSettingId (inferred)
- AlertTimeSpanId → AlertTime.AlertTimeSpanId (inferred)
- AlertTransId → AlertTransaction.AlertTransId (inferred)
- UserId → AspNetUserRoles.UserId (inferred)
- AssetId → Asset.AssetId (inferred)
- AssetModeChangeId → AssetModeChange.AssetModeChangeId (inferred)
- CustomerId → Customer.CustomerId (inferred)
- ModeId → CustomerMode.ModeId (inferred)

Keywords:
alert attempt log, delivery response, notification audit, process log

Table: AlertTypes

Description:
Lookup/reference table listing all available alert types in the system with their names (e.g., speeding, idle, geofence in/out, harsh driving, ignition).

Columns:
- ID: bigint (PK, identity)
- Name: nvarchar (nullable)

Relationships:
- ID → AlertDetails.ID (inferred)
- Name → AspNetUserTokens.Name (inferred)

Keywords:
alert type, notification type, alarm category

Table: AnalysisDataSet

Description:
Stores user-defined data sets for the analysis/reporting module. Each dataset defines which operational modes to include, optional duration filters (min/max), colour coding, and ownership (user/customer).

Columns:
- Id: int (PK, identity)
- DataSetName: nvarchar (nullable)
- ModeIds: nvarchar (nullable)
- IsDuration: bit (nullable)
- DurationMin: float (nullable)
- DurationMax: float (nullable)
- DataSetColor: nvarchar (nullable)
- UserId: nvarchar (nullable)
- Createdate: datetime (nullable)
- Updatedate: datetime (nullable)

Relationships:
- Id → AlertLocationDetail.Id (inferred)
- UserId → AspNetUserRoles.UserId (inferred)

Keywords:
analysis, dataset, mode analysis, duration, colour coded, user dataset

Table: AspNetRoles

Description:
ASP.NET Identity roles table. Stores role definitions used for role-based access control, including normalized name and concurrency stamp for safe concurrent updates.

Columns:
- Id: nvarchar (PK)
- Name: nvarchar (nullable)
- NormalizedName: nvarchar (nullable)
- ConcurrencyStamp: nvarchar (nullable)

Relationships:
- Id → AlertLocationDetail.Id (inferred)
- Name → AspNetUserTokens.Name (inferred)

Keywords:
role, user role, access role, permission group, RBAC

Table: AspNetUserRoles

Description:
Junction table mapping ASP.NET Identity users to their assigned roles. Supports many-to-many user-to-role assignments.

Columns:
- UserId: nvarchar (PK)
- RoleId: nvarchar (PK)

Relationships:
- RoleId → AspNetRoles.Id
- UserId → AspNetUsers.Id

Keywords:
user role mapping, role assignment, user permissions

Table: AspNetUsers

Description:
Extended ASP.NET Identity users table. Stores authentication credentials plus application-specific fields: linked customer, profile name, user status, image path, super-user flag, and password lifecycle dates.

Columns:
- Id: nvarchar (PK)
- UserName: nvarchar (nullable)
- NormalizedUserName: nvarchar (nullable)
- Email: nvarchar (nullable)
- NormalizedEmail: nvarchar (nullable)
- EmailConfirmed: bit
- PasswordHash: nvarchar (nullable)
- SecurityStamp: nvarchar (nullable)
- ConcurrencyStamp: nvarchar (nullable)
- PhoneNumber: nvarchar (nullable)
- PhoneNumberConfirmed: bit
- TwoFactorEnabled: bit
- LockoutEnd: datetimeoffset (nullable)
- LockoutEnabled: bit
- AccessFailedCount: int
- CustomerId: int (nullable)
- Disabled: bit
- TemporaryPassword: bit
- IsSuperUser: bit (nullable)
- PasswordCreatedDate: datetime (nullable)
- EmailCreatedDate: datetime (nullable)
- UserProfileName: varchar (nullable)
- ImagePath: nvarchar (nullable)
- UserStatusId: int (nullable)

Relationships:
- Id → AlertLocationDetail.Id (inferred)
- CustomerId → Customer.CustomerId (inferred)

Keywords:
user, login, account, authentication, password, email, customer user

Table: Asset

Description:
Central asset (vehicle/equipment) registry. Links each asset to its GPS device, customer group, and template. Stores operational config like fuel type, engine-on voltage threshold, odometer unit, CO2 rate, and default driver.

Columns:
- AssetId: int (PK, identity)
- DeviceId: int
- CustomerAssetGroupId: int
- TemplateId: int
- EngineOnVolts: float (nullable)
- FuelType: int
- DescA: varchar (nullable)
- DescB: varchar (nullable)
- DescC: varchar (nullable)
- DescD: varchar (nullable)
- DescE: varchar (nullable)
- AssetTypeId: int
- AssetSubTypeId: int
- DefaultDriverId: int
- VirtualStatus: bigint
- DefaultMileageFlag: int (nullable)
- Billable: int
- IsOdometerInMiles: bit (nullable)
- AveFuelUsage: float (nullable)
- IsFuelInMiles: bit (nullable)
- Co2: float (nullable)

Relationships:
- AssetId → Asset_Temp.AssetId (inferred)
- CustomerAssetGroupId → CustomerAssetGroup.CustomerAssetGroupId (inferred)
- TemplateId → CustomerStatusTemplate.TemplateId (inferred)
- DeviceId → Device.DeviceId (inferred)

Keywords:
asset, vehicle, tracker, fleet, fuel type, odometer, device, CO2

Table: AssetGeofenceEvent

Description:
Records each geofence entry/exit event for an asset. Stores customer location, in/out timestamps (epoch), coordinates, duration inside the geofence, and the driver at time of event.

Columns:
- AssetGeofenceEventId: int (identity)
- AssetId: int
- CustomerLocationId: int
- InTime: bigint
- InLocation: nvarchar (nullable)
- OutTime: bigint (nullable)
- OutLocation: nvarchar (nullable)
- INLatitude: float (nullable)
- INLongitude: float (nullable)
- OutLatitude: float (nullable)
- OutLongitude: float (nullable)
- Duration: bigint (nullable)
- DriverId: int

Relationships:
- AssetId → Asset.AssetId (inferred)
- CustomerLocationId → CustomerLocation.CustomerLocationId (inferred)
- DriverId → Driver.DriverId (inferred)

Keywords:
geofence entry exit, location visit, geofence duration, vehicle location event

Table: AssetJourney

Description:
Stores completed and in-progress asset journeys. Includes start/end location, timestamps, distance travelled, max/average speed, harsh driving counts (acceleration, braking, cornering), overspeed/idle durations, privacy flag, and driver.

Columns:
- AssetJourneyId: int (PK, identity)
- AssetId: int
- StartTime: bigint
- StartLocation: varchar
- EndTime: bigint (nullable)
- EndLocation: varchar (nullable)
- HarshAccelEvents: int
- HarshBreakEvents: int
- HarshLeftEvents: int
- HarshRightEvents: int
- CollisionCount: int
- OverspeedEvents: int
- IdleEvents: int
- JourneyMaxSpeed: float
- JourneyAverageSpeed: float
- JourneyDistanceTravelled: float
- OverspeedDuration: bigint
- IdleDuration: bigint
- PrivacyFlag: int (nullable)
- DriverId: int (nullable)
- CreatedDate: datetime (nullable)
- StationaryTime: int (nullable)
- StartLocationId: int (nullable)
- StartLocationType: int (nullable)
- EndLocationId: int (nullable)
- EndLocationType: int (nullable)
- StartLatitude: float (nullable)
- StartLongitude: float (nullable)
- EndLatitude: float (nullable)
- EndLongitude: float (nullable)
- IsDeleted: bit (nullable)

Relationships:
- AssetId → Asset.AssetId (inferred)
- AssetJourneyId → AssetJourney_Temp.AssetJourneyId (inferred)
- DriverId → Driver.DriverId (inferred)

Keywords:
journey, trip, drive, distance, speed, harsh driving, idle, overspeed

Table: AssetJourney_Archive

Description:
Archive copy of completed AssetJourney records. Used for long-term data retention; mirrors AssetJourney schema and records the date of archival.

Columns:
- Id: bigint (PK, identity)
- AssetJourneyId: int
- AssetId: int
- StartTime: bigint
- StartLocation: varchar
- EndTime: bigint (nullable)
- EndLocation: varchar (nullable)
- HarshAccelEvents: int
- HarshBreakEvents: int
- HarshLeftEvents: int
- HarshRightEvents: int
- CollisionCount: int
- OverspeedEvents: int
- IdleEvents: int
- JourneyMaxSpeed: float
- JourneyAverageSpeed: float
- JourneyDistanceTravelled: float
- OverspeedDuration: bigint
- IdleDuration: bigint
- PrivacyFlag: int (nullable)
- DriverId: int (nullable)
- ArchiveDate: datetime
- IsDeleted: bit (nullable)
- StartLatitude: float (nullable)
- StartLongitude: float (nullable)
- EndLatitude: float (nullable)
- EndLongitude: float (nullable)

Relationships:
- Id → AlertLocationDetail.Id (inferred)
- AssetId → Asset.AssetId (inferred)
- AssetJourneyId → AssetJourney.AssetJourneyId (inferred)
- DriverId → Driver.DriverId (inferred)

Keywords:
journey archive, historical journey, old trips, archived data

Table: AssetJourney_Archive_Temp

Description:
Temporary staging table for journey data being moved to the archive. Used during archival batch processing before permanent storage.

Columns:
- Id: bigint (PK, identity)
- AssetJourneyId: int
- AssetId: int
- StartTime: bigint
- StartLocation: varchar
- EndTime: bigint (nullable)
- EndLocation: varchar (nullable)
- HarshAccelEvents: int
- HarshBreakEvents: int
- HarshLeftEvents: int
- HarshRightEvents: int
- CollisionCount: int
- OverspeedEvents: int
- IdleEvents: int
- JourneyMaxSpeed: float
- JourneyAverageSpeed: float
- JourneyDistanceTravelled: float
- OverspeedDuration: bigint
- IdleDuration: bigint
- PrivacyFlag: int (nullable)
- DriverId: int (nullable)
- ArchiveDate: datetime
- IsDeleted: bit (nullable)
- StartLatitude: float (nullable)
- StartLongitude: float (nullable)
- EndLatitude: float (nullable)
- EndLongitude: float (nullable)

Relationships:
- Id → AlertLocationDetail.Id (inferred)
- AssetId → Asset.AssetId (inferred)
- AssetJourneyId → AssetJourney.AssetJourneyId (inferred)
- DriverId → Driver.DriverId (inferred)

Keywords:
journey archive temp, staging, archive batch

Table: AssetJourney_Temp

Description:

Columns:
- ReportId: bigint (PK, identity)
- CustomerId: int
- UserId: nvarchar (nullable)
- ReportName: nvarchar (nullable)

- ReportTemplate: nvarchar (nullable)
- ReportTemplateBlob: nvarchar (nullable)

- ByAssets: bit (nullable)
- ByDriver: bit (nullable)
- ByCollection: bit (nullable)
- DayTotals: bit (nullable)
- ReportTotals: bit (nullable)
- TotalOnly: bit (nullable)
- IndividualEvents: bit (nullable)
- ReportTemplatePath: varchar (nullable)
- GenerateReportEXCELPath: nvarchar (nullable)
- EXCELReportGenerateDatetime: datetime (nullable)
- GenerateReportPDFPath: nvarchar (nullable)
- PDFReportGenerateDatetime: datetime (nullable)
- CreatedBy: nvarchar (nullable)
- UpdatedBy: nvarchar (nullable)
- CreatedDate: datetime (nullable)
- UpdatedDate: datetime (nullable)
- StandardReportTemplateId: bigint (nullable)
- ByLocation: bit (nullable)

- UserId → AspNetUserRoles.UserId (inferred)
